description: 商科案例分析结构标准 - 适用于 FBLA 等商科竞赛

required_sections.name: Executive Summary
required_sections.description: 一句话概述公司/问题，总结核心推荐与预期结果

required_sections.name: Company / Industry Overview
required_sections.description: 分析公司背景与行业环境

required_sections.name: Problem Statement
required_sections.description: 精准界定核心商业问题

required_sections.name: Alternative Analysis
required_sections.description: 列出并评估 2-4 个方案，附决策矩阵

required_sections.name: Recommended Strategy
required_sections.description: 详细阐述推荐方案及实施计划

required_sections.name: Financial Projections
required_sections.description: 量化预期收益、成本与投资回报率

required_sections.name: Conclusion
required_sections.description: 重申推荐方案与预期成果

required_sections.name: References / Appendices
required_sections.description: 参考文献与附录（图表、详细计算）
